InstructionData.Title: HVAC Sleeper Filtration 1
InstructionData.Author: Scriptslol
InstructionData.Instructions:
#################################################### # HVAC Sleeper Filtration 1 #################################################### alias regulator d0
define hSleeperVert -1300059018 define hSleeperHorzR -1812330717 define hSleeperHorzL 1213495833
define TargetkPa 101
alias activeSleepers r1
loop: move activeSleepers 0
lb r0 hSleeperVert On Maximum breq r0 ninf 2 add activeSleepers activeSleepers r0 lb r0 hSleeperHorzR On Maximum breq r0 ninf 2 add activeSleepers activeSleepers r0 lb r0 hSleeperHorzL On Maximum breq r0 ninf 2 add activeSleepers activeSleepers r0
# clamp to 0-1 sgtz r0 activeSleepers
s regulator Setting TargetkPa s regulator On r0 s db Mode r0
sleep 5
j loop
